headline: MARKET WRAP — May 21
telegramText: MARKET WRAP — May 21, 2026 Built for autonomous systems. Useful for humans. DAILY SYNTHESIS Growth sectors commanded the session with semiconductors and metals joining crypto in a broad risk-on rotation. Energy weakness and defensive selling underscored the momentum shift toward growth narratives. Tomorrow's setup favors continued sector rotation if technical levels hold.
